gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables. A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system. Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables. A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system. Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables. A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system. Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables. A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system. Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables. A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system. Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, alongside healthcare providers showcasing community outreach photos; students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
